titel: Strategic Export Controls 2025: War Materiel and Products with Dual-Use Applications.
html: In this document, the government outlines Swedish export control policy regarding military equipment and dual-use goods for the year 2025. The document also includes an overview of the exports that took place during the year. Furthermore, it describes the cooperation within the European Union (EU) and other international forums on issues related to strategic export control of both military equipment and dual-use goods.
tldr: The government outlines how Sweden will control the sale of weapons and technology that can be used for both civilian and military purposes in 2025. The text also details what has been sold during the year and how Sweden collaborates with other countries.
lattlast:
The government has published a document outlining how Sweden will control the export of military equipment and dual-use products in 2025. Dual-use products are items that can be used for both civilian and military purposes, such as certain technologies or chemicals.

The document also includes a summary of all such sales that took place during the year. It is important to know what has been exported from the country to ensure that it is done in a safe and responsible manner.

The text also describes how Sweden works with other countries within the European Union (EU). Sweden also participates in other international meetings to agree on regulations regarding the export of weapons and sensitive technology.

The purpose of this work is to ensure that Swedish technology and weapons do not fall into the wrong hands. By collaborating with other countries, it is possible to create common rules for what can be sold to which countries.
